global_scroll.headline: Federal Reserve holds interest rates steady and hints at rate hike later this year
Morgan Stanley warns on Warsh's Fed ahead of interest rate cut decision
Federal Reserve holds interest rates steady but leaves door open to hike

daily_pulse.media_headline: India macro indicators remain in focus amid policy and liquidity shifts.

opportunities: India’s structural growth story remains intact across domestic demand and policy support.
Technology services and GCC expansion continue to reshape India’s export mix.
AI adoption is gradually moving from pilots toward broader enterprise deployment.
Long-term wealth creation remains tied to manufacturing, services, and financial deepening.
Digital infrastructure and platform-led services could widen India’s strategic influence.
Sovereign compute and AI talent ecosystems are central to long-horizon competitiveness.
